notes: Local pair artifacts were measured before and after the auto-batch cap change; on raspberrypi, auto_w4 already resolves to effective_batch_size=500 under the current default.
At 20k, the raspberrypi run shows the capped auto heuristic remains aligned with the explicit 500 schedule within the expected measurement envelope.
The comparison is intended to validate that the new 500-cap default does not regress on the slower host.
